name: Elan Valley: Pen y Garreg & Craig Goch
terrain: Tarmac road, forestry track, open moor
highlights: Classic upper Elan horseshoe taking in Pen y Garreg's castellated dam and Craig Goch's tiered arches.
points_of_interest: Pen y Garreg dam tower; Craig Goch dam (most photographed); Aberystwyth mountain road junction
viewpoints: Dam-top panoramas; wild upland reservoirs with no habitation
water_features: Pen y Garreg & Craig Goch reservoirs
picnic_spots: Picnic tables at Pen y Garreg car park
parking_start: Pen y Garreg or Craig Goch car park
food_drink_nearby: Elan Valley Visitor Centre café; Old Swan Tea Room Rhayader
hazards_notes: Exposed; weather changes quickly at 330m altitude
